---
name: Experiment request
about: Track a new sim-outorder experiment or analysis question
title: "Experiment: "
labels: experiment
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

Describe the architecture question this experiment should answer.

## Benchmarks

List benchmark set or explicit benchmark IDs.

## Configuration Changes

List proposed `sim-outorder` parameters.

## Expected Report Output

Describe the table, chart, or comparison that should appear in the HTML report.

## Validation

State whether this should run as `smoke`, a capped run, or a full uncapped run.
